description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a tan polymer body and a black metal upper receiver and barrel assembly. The rifle features a prominent Picatinny rail along the top for mounting optics or accessories, and a detachable box magazine in a matching tan color. The stock is robust and appears to be fixed, with a slight angle for ergonomic shoulder placement. The barrel is medium length and ends with a black flash hider. The overall design is angular and utilitarian, with visible controls such as the trigger, magazine release, and safety selector.
description: A tan and black tactical rifle with a fixed stock, detachable box magazine, and a Picatinny rail for accessories.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tan body, fixed stock, black barrel, and magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel, flash hider, and narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 0, with controls and magazine visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and the alignment of the upper receiver and barrel.
